title: Amali Thumali Lyrics Ko Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers : Hariharan, Swetha Mohan & Chinmayi
Song: Amali Thumali
Lyrics : Viveka
Movie: Ko

Amali Thumli neliyum veyli, Ennai kavvi kondathey
Alagu Idupin oru paathi ennai allichendrathey
coloumbus kanavilum ninaikatha oru desam alaikuthey
Koluthum veyililum enna kulae kulir kaatrum veesuthey

Roja poovum..Adi mullil pookum ena ariveney
Pena mullil..Indha poovum poothathoru maayam
Maari Maari..Unnai parka solli vizhi kenjum
Endhan nenjodu nenjodu kadhal pongi vaarudhey

Amali Thumli neliyum veyli, Ennai kavvi kondathey
Alagu Idupin oru pathi ennai allichendrathey....hey
coloumbus kanavilum ninaikatha oru desam alaikuthey
Koluthum veyililum enna kulae kulir kaatrum veesuthey

Vaa ena sollavum thayakam..
Manam poo ena thallavum marukkum
Ingu kadhalin paathayil aanaithum,
Ada perungulapam...

Aarugal aruginil irundhum
Adai malai adhu so enna polindhum
Adi nee mattum thoorathil irunthal
Naav varandu vidum.....

ey ku vaa kuvaa kuvaa kuvvaa... kuyilethu..
ey th vaa thava thava thavvaa... Manamedhu..

ohhh.. Mudhal mazhai nanaithadhai poley
Mudhal karai adainthadhai poley
kuthikiren kuthikiren mela.. aaruyirey...

ohhh.. Enaku unnai koduthadhu pothum
Tharai thoda marukuthu paatham
Enakini urakamum thooram..Dhevathaiye..

Kaalkalil aadidum kolusu
Adhan oosaikal bhoomiku pudhusu
Adhai kadhugal ketidum pozhudhu
Naan kaviarasu

Merkilum sooriyan udikum,
Neer minmini sootilum kothikum
Ada aruginil nee ulla varaikum miga mana manakum..

ey po vaa povaa povaa po vaa siripaaley
ey av vaa avvaa avvaa avvaa theerthayae

hey sudamalae anigalan illai
thodamalay udal palan illai
vida malae manathinil tholai. kaaadhaliyae

Thoda thoda inithana illai
Idai veli migunthidum thollai
Adaiyellam magilchiyin ellai. Koodaliye oh..

Amali Thumli neliyum veyli, Ennai kavvi kondathe
Alagu Idupin oru paathi ennai allichendrathey
coloumbus kanavilum ninaikatha oru desam alaikuthe
Koluthum veyililum enna kulae kulir kaatrum veesuthe

Pena mullil..Indha poovum poothathoru maayam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the singers of the song Amali Thumali?

The song is sung by Hariharan, Chinmayi, and Shweta Mohan.

Which movie features the song Amali Thumali?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Ko, released in 2011.

Who composed the music for Ko?

The music for the movie Ko was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Ko?

The lead roles in Ko are played by Jiiva and Karthika Nair.

What is the theme of the song Amali Thumali?

The song portrays a lively and celebratory mood, making it a perfect choice for joyous occasions.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song "Amali Thumali" from the 2011 Tamil movie "Ko" features the lead actors Jiiva and Karthika Nair. Composed by Harrish Jeyaraj and sung by Hariharan, Chinmayi, and Shweta Mohan, this track exudes an energetic and celebratory vibe. The lyrics by Viveka add a poetic charm, enhancing the song's appeal. It captures the essence of joy and festivity, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical repertoire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Amali Thumali, a vibrant song from the movie Ko, showcases the dynamic collaboration of Harrish Jeyaraj's music composition and the melodious voices of Hariharan, Chinmayi, and Shweta Mohan. This energetic track, released in 2011, captures the essence of celebration and joy. Dive into this musical masterpiece and experience its captivating rhythm and lively beats.
stanzaMeanings: Singers: Hariharan, Swetha Mohan & Chinmayi. Song: Amali Thumali. Lyrics: Viveka. Movie: Ko

The beautiful light shines brightly, Don't let it capture me. This is a part of me that has been pulled away, A country that Columbus never dreamed of. Even in the scorching sun, the cool breeze blows over me.
The rose flower... I know it blooms in the thorn. In the thorn, this flower blooms like a magic. Again and again... When I look at you, my eyes get lost. My heart, my heart, love flows in.

The beautiful light shines brightly, Don't let it capture me. This is a part of me that has been pulled away... hey, A country that Columbus never dreamed of. Even in the scorching sun, the cool breeze blows over me.
Come, whatever you say is a comfort... The heart blooms, whatever it pushes away, forgets. Here, on the path of love, everything is a big celebration...
Even if the troubles are nearby, that garland is what I want. If you are just a little far away, we will be separated...
Hey, come, come, come... chirping... hey, come, come, come... in my heart.
Ohhh... Like the first rain that falls, Like the first shore that is reached, I am dancing, dancing, higher... oh, life...
Ohhh... Giving you to me is enough. The stage is slowly fading away. My dreams are far away... Oh, goddess...
The anklets that dance on the feet, Their sound is new to the earth. When the stories are heard, I become a poet.
Even in the dark, the sun shines, Water sparkles in the light. Until you come close, my heart is very happy...
Hey, go, go, go... smile... hey, they go, go, go, go, they are resolved.
Hey, my dear, there is no sweetness without a touch, There is no fruit without a body, In the heart, there is a loss. Oh, love...
Little by little, this is not sweet. This is a joy that is hidden outside. All of this is the end of happiness. Oh, my love...

The beautiful light shines brightly, Don't let it capture me. This is a part of me that has been pulled away, A country that Columbus never dreamed of. Even in the scorching sun, the cool breeze blows over me. The rose flower... I know it blooms in the thorn. In the thorn, this flower blooms like a magic. Again and again... When I look at you, my eyes get lost. My heart, my heart, love flows in.
